title: 高松宮記念の後に・アツアツ名勝負！

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Coming in first place, it's Hishi Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff! Pheeew! That was...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: AWESOME!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Bono... I... I feel so frustrated right now!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: But still, I was able to run at full speed!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you ahead of me made me want to
overtake you with everything I had... So I just
wanna say...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Bono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Her sheer power was overwhelming!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Bono's so huge, fast, and powerful! Did you see
how her feet ripped up the turf with every stride
she took?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
When she passed right in front me, I seriously felt
like I was witnessing pure greatness. Time seemed
to stop! Haha!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Biko was really impressive too! I felt how badly
she wanted to win from the second she stepped
up to the gate!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
That energy of hers made her look just as big as
Bono to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fans show their appreciation with a rousing
round of applause for all the racers.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That was so inspiring! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Th-this is the crowd Carrot Ranger is always
greeted with!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...Biko!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
My heart feels so hot and tight, like I'm getting a
big hug right now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I feel just like piping hot chanko!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I got to run with you today! I'd never
run in such a bubbling hot race before!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thank you for everything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her emotions overtake her, and Hishi Akebono
sweeps Biko Pegasus off her feet and into a big
bear hug.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I'm really happy too, Bono! Thanks for running
with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Chukyo Racecourse overflows with applause
and excitement, long after the race ends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, at Tracen Academy...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That was amazin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's Bono and Biko for ya! That sure was an
exciting race!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Have you decided on your next race?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I was thinking of the Yasuda Kinen since I
want to keep taking on challenges at top speed!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Would that be all right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the Yasuda Kinen! That's where fighters throw
down to be crowned Ruler of the Mile!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right! This is no time for me to be twiddlin' my
thumbs!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I've gotta land a spot right next to her!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hi, Tai—whoa! She's gone already! Dang, she's
gotten a lot faster since last year.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I wonder if she'll run in the Yasuda Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono has left a huge impression on
many fans as well as other racers at the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Yasuda Kinen squarely in our sights, it's
time to put our noses to the grindstone and train!
